trails.name: HOLLYFORD TK - MACKERROW IS HUT JUNCTION
HOLLYFORD TK - NTH END L MCKERROW TO MAR
LONG REEF POINT TO BIG BAY HUT TRACK
FALLS CREEK ROUTE
trails.description: A challenging tramping route from the Milford Road into the Falls Creek valley, surrounded by impressive Fiordland mountains.

trails.name: SUGARLOAF RTBN TO ROCKBURN JCN TK
ROCKBURN JCN TO SYLVAN/ROCKBURN JCN TK
REES TK - CRPK TO PARK BOUNDARY
REES TK - PARK BDY TO SHELTER ROCK
REES TK - SHELTER ROCK TO REES SADDLE
DART TK - REES SADDLE TO DART HUT
DART TK - NTH END CATTLE FLAT TO DALEYS
DART HUT TO CASCADE SADDLE ROUTE
PYKE TK - ALABASTER HUT TO OLIVINE HUT
HOLLYFORD TK - NTH END L MCKERROW TO MCK
ROUTEBURN NATURE WALK
trails.description: An easy going, well interpreted loop track ideal for a family walk. It passes through beech/tawhai forest and other vegetation, similar to what the famed Routeburn Track passes through.

trails.name: ROCK PEAK TO TOUHYS SADDLE TRACK
MT MCINTOSH LOOP TRACK
trails.description: A steep overnight tramp with magnificent views through open tussock land.

trails.name: MOKE LAKE LOOP TRACK
trails.description: This popular walk takes you on a loop around the lake. Superb views are on offer as you travel through grassland surrounded by mountains.

trails.name: GST TK-MCK HUT TO MCK SADDLE TURNOFF
GST TK-GST HUT TURNOFF-STH END NARROWS
CAPLES TK - MID CAPLES TO TOP FLAT
CAPLES TRACK - TOP FLAT TO BUSHLINE
CROWN RANGE SUMMIT TO ROCK PEAK TRACK
MORAINE CREEK ROUTE
trails.description: This challenging tramping route leads up the Moraine Creek from the Hollyford Road to beautiful Lake Adelaide in an impressive glacial basin.

trails.name: ROB ROY TRACK
trails.description: This track offers an easy route into a dramatic alpine landscape that includes snowfields, glaciers, sheer rock cliffs and waterfalls. Older children should be able to complete the track.

trails.name: LAKE HAYES WALKWAY
trails.description: Stroll, walk, run or cycle around a lake surrounded by spectacular mountains. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: ROUTEBURN TK - FALLS TO HARRIS SADDLE
LAKE SYLVAN TO ROCKBURN SHELTER TK
DART HUT TO NORTH END CATTLE FLAT TRACK
LIVERPOOL TRACK
trails.description: Liverpool Track is in the Matukituki Valley, an hour’s drive west from Wanaka. The track starts at Aspiring Hut which you get to on the West Matukituki Track.

trails.name: DART TK - DALEYS FLAT HUT TO SURVEYORS
ROCKBURN JCN TO THEATRE FLAT TK
CAPLES TK - CONFLUENCE TO MID CAPLES
LAKE SYLVAN TRACK
trails.description: This well-defined track leads through old moraine river terraces and tall red beech/tawhai raunui to pretty Lake Sylvan in Mount Aspiring National Park.

trails.name: HOLLYFORD TK - HIDDEN FALLS HUT TURN OFF
DIAMOND CREEK WALK
trails.description: The track at Diamond Creek follows the true left bank of the creek to Lake Reid.

trails.name: HOWDEN SHELTER TO LAKE MACKENZIE HUT
LAKE MACKENZIE HUT TO HARRIS SADDLE
PYKE TK - OLIVINE HUT TO PYKE CROSSING
PYKE TK - PYKE CROSSING TO BIG BAY HUT
CASCADE SADDLE TK - Asp Hut to Bush Edge
CASCADE SADDLE RT - BUSH EDGE TO HEADS L
HOLLYFORD TK - HIDDEN FALLS HUT TO HOLLY
GREENSTONE TK - HOWDEN HUT TO HEAD OF L.
DORE PASS ROUTE
trails.description: This challenging tramping route leads from the Milford Road to Glade House on the Milford Track, via Dore Pass.

trails.name: Lake Ellery Track
trails.description: Walk through native beech and podocarp forest to a glacier-formed lake carved out by the former Arawhata Glacier.

trails.name: DIAMOND LAKE LOOP TRACK
trails.description: Enjoy a family-friendly walk around Diamond Lake. The walk leads to other tracks in the area.

trails.name: LOWER CIRCUIT TRACK
trails.description: This track has outstanding views over Lake Wānaka. Sections of track are often slippery.

trails.name: ROCKY MOUNTAIN TRACK
trails.description: This circuit winds its way around Rocky Mountain. There are outstanding views of Lake Wānaka and surrounding mountains.

trails.name: SKIPPERS RD TO ATLEY TERRACE TRACK
SHOTOVER SADDLE ROUTE
trails.description: The Shotover Saddle Route offers magnificent views of the West Matukituki and Rob Roy valleys.

trails.name: Atleys Track
trails.description: You can see many historic gold mining features from Atleys Track and there are superb views from the summit of Mt Dewar.

trails.name: Bullendale & Dynamo Hut Tracks
trails.description: Traverse rugged Skippers Creek to see New Zealand’s first industrial hydro power scheme or take the trail to the heart of Skippers’ quartz reef mining history.

trails.name: Cascade Saddle Route
trails.description: The Cascade Saddle Route is an alpine crossing recommended for experienced trampers as a fine weather, summer route.

trails.name: Crystal Battery Track
trails.description: Retrace the miners’ daily walk from their homes in Skippers to the Crystal Mine, their workplace in the 1930s and 40s.

trails.name: Deadmans Track
trails.description: This challenging tramping route from the Hollyford Road climbs the slope to meet the Routeburn Track near Harris Saddle.

trails.name: Diamond Creek Track
trails.description: The track at Diamond Creek follows the true left bank of the creek to Lake Reid.

trails.name: Diamond Lake and Rocky Mountain walks
trails.description: Choose from several walks including short, easier options suitable for kids, and enjoy views of Diamond Lake, Lake Wānaka and the surrounding mountains.

trails.name: Earnslaw Burn Track
trails.description: Following Earnslaw Burn through bush to the tussock basin at the head of this valley for impressive views of an icefall on Mt Earnslaw/Pikirakatahi.

trails.name: East Matukituki Valley tracks
trails.description: The East Matukituki Valley provides interesting day walks and access to several demanding tramping and climbing routes in Mount Aspiring National Park.

trails.name: French Ridge Track
trails.description: After walking up the valley, a challenging track crosses the Matukituki River and climbs through bush to tussock slopes in the sub-alpine zone.

trails.name: Gertrude Saddle Route
trails.description: Gertrude Saddle includes rocky alpine terrain and should only be attempted by experienced trampers and in good weather. Wet weather, snow or ice create treacherous conditions in any season.

trails.name: Glacier Burn Track
trails.description: At Glacier Burn you'll climb through beech forest to Glacier Basin. Follow the creek beyond to view the Humboldt Mountains.

trails.name: Glenorchy Walkway
trails.description: This short walk over a beautiful wetland has plenty of bird life and is great for kids.

trails.name: Hollyford Track: Hidden Falls Track
trails.description: Enjoy this easy day walk along the Hollyford Track to the beautiful Hidden Falls or the nearby hut for lunch.

trails.name: Humboldt Falls Track
trails.description: This easy, well graded walking track from the Hollyford Road takes you on a short climb through rainforest to the lookout of the impressive Humboldt Falls.

trails.name: Hut Creek Track
trails.description: This difficult tramping track leads from the Milford Road and up the Hut Creek Valley through beech forest to the river flats.

trails.name: Invincible Gold Mine Track
trails.description: Built by miners in the 1880s, the Invincible Gold Mine Track is an uphill walk that offers wonderful views of the Rees Valley and Mt Earnslaw/Pikirakatahi.

trails.name: Kea Basin Track
trails.description: It takes half a day to climb to this beautiful sub-alpine tussock basin beneath Mt Earnslaw/Pikirakatahi.

trails.name: Lake Marian Track
trails.description: Enjoy this tramping track from Hollyford Road (off Milford Road) to beautiful Lake Marian - an alpine lake in a beautiful hanging valley.

trails.name: Lake Rere walk
trails.description: A steep climb through red beech eases before reaching picturesque Lake Rere, a popular tourist destination in the late 19th century.

trails.name: Liverpool Track
trails.description: Liverpool Track is in the Matukituki Valley, an hour’s drive west from Wanaka. The track starts at Aspiring Hut which you get to on the West Matukituki Track.

trails.name: Mistake Creek Track
trails.description: This difficult tramping track leads from the Milford Road and up the Mistake Creek Valley through beech forest to the river flats.

trails.name: Mt Judah / Heather Jock Tracks
trails.description: Scheelite mining history, open tussock country and grand views await on these tracks - with the option of staying overnight in the basic Heather Jock Hut.

trails.name: Oxenbridge Tunnel Track
trails.description: A short easy walk to a viewpoint that overlooks the historic Oxenbridge Tunnel river diversion and an old steam engine.

trails.name: Pass Creek Track
trails.description: This difficult tramping track leads from the Hollyford Road up to Lake Howden on the Routeburn Track.

trails.name: Pearl Flat to head of the valley
trails.description: This track climbs through beech forest crossing swingbridges to bring you to the head of the Matukituki Valley.

trails.name: Routeburn Track: Earland Falls Track
trails.description: This is a fabulous, easy day walk on the Routeburn Track (a Great Walk), leading to the beautiful Earland Falls with plenty of mountain and valley views along the way.

trails.name: Routeburn Track: Key Summit Track
trails.description: Enjoy panoramic views over mountains and alpine lakes on this half-day walk off Milford Road on the Routeburn Track - it's suitable families with children.

trails.name: Routeburn Track: Lake Howden Track
trails.description: For a taste of the Routeburn Track Great Walk, walk to Lake Howden with plenty of mountain and valley views along the way.

trails.name: Scott Creek Track
trails.description: This route is for experienced trampers. It is irregularly marked, steep and in parts obscure and washed out.

trails.name: Sugarloaf/Rockburn Track
trails.description: This marked track traverses moraine through beech forest from Lake Sylvan.

trails.name: West Matukituki Track
trails.description: Following the river and with views of notable glaciers, the West Matukituki Valley track takes you through sections of open farmland, native forest, and grassy flats before finishing at the head of the valley.

trails.name: Rock Peak Track
trails.description: Get great views from this track at the southern end of the Pisa range.

trails.name: Crown Range Road summit to Tuohys Gully
trails.description: Get great views from this track at the southern end of the Pisa Range and then continue along the tops to Tuohys Gully.
